reviews.review_description: Want to get some steam off after a long, stressful day at work? This is your game. Get your fists ready 👊 ✊️ 🤛 🤜 👊 and go have some fun. Feel your fists getting tired? Grab whatever you find and smack the 💩 out of the drunken villains. Use your superpowers to clean up the mess in your town. Good work, devs, keep it up 👍

The game is great and the punches feel absolute holy, I just think the game will do even better with these improvements.

1. Collisions between the objects. The immersion is ruined when my bottle passes right through another one mid swing.

2. The ability to grab enemies. I think this game will be so much mote chaotic with the ability to grab and throw your enemies without the need of the telekinesis potion.

I believe that with these I improvements, the game will be one of the best of the beat em up style. So I hope the developers take into consideration to add these tiny, but game changing details.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your feedback, it’s really interesting and helpful. We’ve passed it on to the game developers! 

See you in the tavern :)

reviews.review_description: I love it so far its only been out for ten min but been waiting on it.  Beautiful game, lore is fantastic. Good voice acting.  punches feel good and going wwf with a chair is satisfying.  love it. GG

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much 🙌, super happy you’re enjoying it already!
And we see you’ve mastered the “chair technique” pretty fast 😄

reviews.review_description: The game is quite simple in mechanics and easy to control without complex manipulations, but nevertheless, it is well-made, has excellent voice acting, and is very enjoyable to play
I loved the game and if in the future they added a cooperative or multiplayer arena it would be the best game
😊 thank you so very much for your game ❤️❤️❤️❤️

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review it means a lot! 🙌

reviews.review_description:
I love a good bar brawl, and this didn't disappoint! Nice fight physics, varied enemies, and fun power-ups!

Gameplay & impressions here!:

https://youtu.be/dYWYwSJg_qU
